SFX COATING SHIMMERING TIDE NOW AVAILABLE


The SFX coating Shimmering Tide for Selena: Pianissimo, as well as the accompanying weapon coating Summer Strings, are now available for purchase!


Duration: 2026/7/17 (after maintenance) - 2026/8/18, 23:00 (UTC)

Purchase Entrance: Top-up - Coating Supply


Shimmering Tide

Selena: Pianissimo SFX Coating

Price: 168 RC, 1 purchase limit


Summer Strings

Bowstring Rapier Weapon Coating

Price: 28 RC, 1 purchase limit


*The coatings Shimmering Tide and Summer Strings will NOT enter the regular Coating Shop (Rainbow Card) in the future.
